query:
SELECT 
  pt.id,
  pt.accountId,
  pt.amount,
  pt.type,
  pt.strategy,
  pt.recordedAt,
  t.symbol,
  t.action,
  t.strike,
  t.expiration,
  t.quantity,
  t.premium,
  t.status
FROM premiumTracking pt
LEFT JOIN trades t ON pt.tradeId = t.id
WHERE pt.recordedAt >= '2026-03-01'
ORDER BY pt.recordedAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
